channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fridge left on street, 19th July
item.description:
Fridge left on street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Pellatt Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 bikes dumped, 19th July
item.description:
4 bikes, 2 Lime and 2 Forest dumped on the pavements with the usual care and consideration of their users. They are a clear hazard to people with vision limitations and a nuisance to pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Morland Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Ashly court on pavement, 19th July
item.description:
A big cardboard box with packaging left on the pavement. If blown on to the road, could obstruct traffic on station road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Station Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin not emptied, again!, 19th July
item.description:
The bin is overflowing again. This has been reported numerous times and I was assured it would be emptied on a more regular basis.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hook Lane, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant litter all around this area of the street, 19th July
item.description:
Theres constant litter all across this street. It needs picking up and sorting. The street is starting to stink really badly. Please sort this out.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Nutcroft Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping Minden Road & Open Space, 19th July
item.description:
Fly Tipping Minden Road & Open Space

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Minden Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: These bins are constantly overflowing and stink, 19th July
item.description:
These bins are stinking the whole street out and theres rats all around there
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Nutcroft Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 19th July
item.description:
Black bag full of garden waste outside 153 Welling Way.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 152, Welling Way, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish outside block, 19th July
item.description:
Fridge has been left outside the block 296-242 Wricklemarsh Road The area by the stairwell is full of rubbish and overgrown with weeds. These leaves were cleared by council over 3 weeks ago but the bags have been left here as well as bags of leaves at the back of the property. In general the streets are filthy and full of rubbish in the surrounding areas, particularly Farjeon Road towards Shooters Hill

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wricklemarsh Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 19th July
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Haselbury Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spider web bush, 19th July
item.description:
Spider web infestation/bush Causing a lot of distress within the neighbourhood. Especially with the younger children and homes close by..

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Daintry Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At least 3 black bags containing GARDEN WASTE, 19th July
item.description:
My neighbour at no8 oakdene has fur tree in front garden today I witnessed and took video on my phone clearly showing the Tennant Lorraine cavindish and her brother who don’t live here Lorraine standing at bottom of ladder while Paul continued to cut and saw at the fir tree this was at 12 :38 confirm time from video and then at 2:20 pm I saw Paul taking the bags down to Carlton grove and placing them beside food waste bin Knowing full well that we can not put anything here we had letters from Southwark about this Lorraine was inside the home when he took them out but knew exactly where they had been placed coz he came back and wasn’t longer than 2 mins and then could be herd out in back garden area shouting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13-53, Carlton Grove, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised dangerous paving slab causing damage to my drive way as pushed drain cover up and now warped, 19th July
item.description:
The raised and uneven paving slab by tree root has now pushed forward the other two slabs that have caused damage to my foot of driveway as they have warped the gutter/drive way drain cover so it’s popped up and won’t be flushed now again causing a trip hazard to member public and damage to my property- the slabs need re aligning and straightening to allow my drain hole to be able to clip on as it’s pushed and warped it all out of shape and damaged it!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Rosebery Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging Bushes blocking highway, 19th July
item.description:
Overgrown bushes are blocking the pavement causing pedestrians to step in to road, causing a clear danger. This contravenes Section 154 of the Highways Act 1980. Remedial work should be conducted within 14 days along this stretch of the hill as bushes in a number of places are overhanging and have been known to be hit by vehicles. Please can this be rectified as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Vicars Hill, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish at the entrance to Covet Wood, 19th July
item.description:
Dumped rubbish at the entrance to Covet wood from Covet wood.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Covet Wood Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please replace this bin?, 19th July
item.description:
It is broken, overflowing and stinks Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexis Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish blockinh passage, 19th July
item.description:
People keep leaving rubbish here which makes it impossible to navigate this passage if you have a buggy or have limited mobility.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ambleside Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Toys, clothes and general waste flytipped at the bottom of Rosenthorpe Road, 19th July
item.description:
General flytipping here again. Toys, box, clothing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rosenthorpe Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Empty tree pit, 19th July
item.description:
Old tree was removed and roots ground down a while ago - no tree has been replanted ideally needs replacing and two/three more added to bourdon to offer some shade to the street. Ideally not trees which have berrys that birds eat as they then drop lots of faeces on cars.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourdon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please sort out the bins on Alexis St green, 19th July
item.description:
Overflowing bins need emptying. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexis Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
